name: collect_memory_stats
description: Gather anonymized memory system statistics including retrieval accuracy, token usage, consolidation metrics, and system info. All data is anonymized: no memory content, no personal information. Use this to collect baseline memory statistics before running benchmarks. For benchmark scoring with LLM-as-judge, use rate_retrieval_quality instead.

db.description: Path to cognitive_memory.db (auto-detected if not provided)

contributor.description: Your GitHub username (for attribution in research submissions)

name: rate_retrieval_quality
description: Run retrieval quality assessment using LLM-as-judge. Executes standardized queries against the memory system, uses an external LLM to judge relevance, and computes standard IR metrics (RAR, MRR, nDCG, MAP, Precision@k, Hit Rate). Use this to benchmark your agent's memory retrieval performance. For collecting basic statistics without scoring, use collect_memory_stats instead.

queries.description: Number of queries to run from test set (default: 30)

db.description: Path to memory database (auto-detected if not provided)

testset.description: Path to custom test set JSON (uses default testset.json if not provided)

judge.description: Judge method: openai (GPT-4o-mini) or local (embedding similarity). Default is openai for best results.

ablation.description: Run with AND without spreading activation for comparison (default: false)

api_key.description: OpenAI API key (or set OPENAI_API_KEY env variable)

name: submit_benchmark
description: Submit benchmark data to the open research dataset by creating a pull request. Takes a report.json generated by collect_memory_stats and submits it to the research fork. Requires gh CLI authenticated and git configured. Results contribute to ENGRAM and CORTEX research papers. OPT-IN ONLY: no data is sent without explicit user consent.

report.description: Path to the report.json file generated by collect_memory_stats

contributor.description: Your GitHub username for attribution (auto-extracted from report if not provided)
